## Verses (5)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Let your salvation come quickly, O God; come quickly to my help, O Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Let those who go after my soul have shame and trouble; let those who have evil designs against me be turned back and made foolish. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Let those who say Aha, aha! be turned back as a reward of their shame. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | Let all those who are looking for you be glad and have joy in you; let the lovers of your salvation ever say, May God be great. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | But I am poor and in need; come to me quickly, O God; you are my help and my saviour; let there be no waiting, O Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
